operator_declarations.opcode_semantics: Preserve declared source-row order and select exactly source_position values whose position-keyed scope row has exact actor, interpreted-target, relation, context, and canonical target-resolution equality; resolved equality includes external alias and resolution is never upgraded.

Join selected positions to position-keyed effective rows, preserve selected order, and retain exactly rows whose effective-before-k value is true; missing or duplicate position rows are CONTRACT_ERROR and never cast to zero.

Join eligible positions only to deterministic position-keyed narrative-terrain rows and emit zero or more source_profile_projection receipts, exactly one per joined row, with source_position, source-kind token, and unchanged profile; preserve eligible order and reject duplicate joins. An empty join emits an empty receipt collection, not a placeholder. No other source kind is visible to this operator.

Join eligible positions only to deterministic position-keyed adopted-integration rows, require adopted_fixture status, and emit zero or more source_profile_projection receipts, exactly one per joined row, with source_position, source-kind token, and unchanged profile; preserve eligible order and reject duplicate joins. An empty join emits an empty receipt collection. No other source kind is visible.

Join eligible positions only to deterministic position-keyed contested metadata rows and emit zero or more unsettled_source_diagnostic receipts, exactly one per joined contested_fixture row, containing source_position, source-kind token, and contested-present. An empty join emits an empty receipt collection. No direction profile is visible to this operator; D1 never casts contested material to adopted integration or support.

Intersect position-keyed accessibility snapshot records with effective eligible positions and require exactly one eligible snapshot. Emit one accessibility_projection receipt containing its position, fixed source-kind token pre_access_accessibility_snapshot, unchanged status, and accessible implicit positions: accessible_fixture admits eligible implicit positions and withheld_fixture yields an empty position list. Zero or multiple eligible snapshots are CONTRACT_ERROR, and post-k or out-of-scope opposite snapshots cannot affect the result.

Join accessibility-admitted positions only to deterministic position-keyed implicit-trace rows and emit zero or more source_profile_projection receipts, exactly one per joined row, with source_position, source-kind token, and unchanged profile; preserve admitted order and reject duplicate joins. An empty join emits an empty receipt collection. No other source kind is visible.

For each direction independently, return the maximum present ordinal rank only across ordered source_profile_projection outputs from terrain, adopted integration, and accessibility-admitted implicit sources; exclude unsettled_source_diagnostic outputs. When no contributing projection has a present component, emit exactly {status:missing, reason:source_unresolved}; never copy or rank missing reasons, add, or cancel.

Close exactly one source semantic decision from the componentwise support profile plus typed prior receipts. Form a unique eligible-position set only from accepted source_profile_projection receipts, unsettled diagnostics, and accessibility receipts; reject any receipt position absent from declared_source_positions_ordered, then stable-filter that declared order list to the set without numeric sorting or adding unseen positions. Derive source_kinds_used as the duplicate-free lexicographically sorted source-kind tokens from those same receipts, contested_present only from unsettled diagnostics without importing any contested profile into support, and accessibility_relation from zero or one accessibility receipt. Copy access_ordinal_k unchanged to semantic access_ordinal_k and to effective_before_access_ordinal as the exclusive effective-order boundary; eligible_source_position_count is the ordered position-list length. Do not attach opaque lineage.

After the semantic decision is closed, copy the exact structured opaque_scope_lineage object from fixture scope to semantic.scope_lineage without inspecting or reconstructing any field and without changing the decision. Source aliases are non-output and are never attached.

Create one formation_transition_state carrying immutable current_access_present, source_materials_present, and declared_base_encounter_profile exactly as supplied. Initialize mutable current_profile_or_missing to the declared base profile only when both booleans are true, otherwise to exact tagged missing reason no_current_access with precedence over no_source_material. Initialize formation_operator_order with base_profile and both intervention-applied flags false.

Transform exactly one complete formation_transition_state while preserving immutable current_access_present, source_materials_present, and declared_base_encounter_profile. Append apply_reception_eligibility to formation_operator_order. For present current_profile_or_missing and matching scope, apply componentwise min to direction fit/receptivity and ambiguity/tolerance while passing activation and mark reception applied true; on scope mismatch pass the profile unchanged and keep the flag false. For tagged missing input, preserve the exact missing tag and both immutable fields without inventing content.

Transform exactly one complete formation_transition_state while preserving immutable current_access_present, source_materials_present, and declared_base_encounter_profile. Append apply_target_directional_compatibility to formation_operator_order. For present current_profile_or_missing and matching scope, apply componentwise min to direction fit/target support while passing ambiguity and activation and mark target applied true; on scope mismatch pass the profile unchanged and keep the flag false. For tagged missing input, preserve the exact missing tag and all immutable fields without inventing content.

Close one formation semantic decision only from the complete formation_transition_state: copy immutable current_access_present, source_materials_present, and declared_base_encounter_profile to their result fields; set encounter_emitted true exactly for present current_profile_or_missing; emit that present value as formed_encounter_profile or preserve the exact tagged missing reason; copy only state-carried applied flags; and append emit_proxy to the exact operator order. Opaque scope lineage is attached only by the subsequent common binder.
If and only if current access, source material, and at least one accessible position exist, seed the first declared accessible position; otherwise return the empty seed.

From the seed, perform deterministic breadth-first traversal over normalized undirected edges in declared edge order, then append any disconnected accessible positions in declared position order; never change the accessible set.

Transform exactly one complete current_candidate_relation_state. If inactive, preserve the inactive reason, empty candidates, visits, ranks, and registered relations, append a skipped_inactive stage receipt for broaden, and add no registered relation or marker. If active, add direction relations from visited profiles with support rank at least one, append broaden to registered operation relations and an applied stage receipt, and preserve visits and ranks. Emit the next complete state, never a detached delta.

Transform exactly one complete current_candidate_relation_state. If inactive, preserve it, append a skipped_inactive stage receipt for contrast, and add no registered relation or marker. If active, append a contested relation marker when both directions are present, otherwise preserve the relation, append contrast to registered operation relations and an applied stage receipt. Emit the next complete state and do not adjudicate.

Transform exactly one complete current_candidate_relation_state. If inactive, preserve it, append a skipped_inactive stage receipt for counterfactual, and add no registered relation or marker. If active, append an alternative-cause marker when at least two visited positions support different directions, append counterfactual to registered operation relations and an applied stage receipt, and preserve direction support, ranks, and visits. Emit the next complete state and do not adjudicate.

Transform exactly one complete current_candidate_relation_state. If inactive, preserve it, append a skipped_inactive stage receipt for confirmation_only, and add no registered relation. If active, retain only directions congruent with the first visited material at rank at least one, append confirmation_only to registered operation relations and an applied stage receipt, and preserve visits and ranks. Emit the next complete state.

Transform exactly one complete current_candidate_relation_state. If inactive, preserve it, append a skipped_inactive stage receipt for rehearsal, and add no registered relation or marker. If active, append a rehearsed relation marker, append rehearsal to registered operation relations and an applied stage receipt without increasing rank or changing visits. Emit the next complete state.

Create the initial complete candidate_relation_state. With one or more visited positions set activity=active, include positive and/or negative per visited material when support rank is at least one, preserve visits and ranks, use the unique negative-before-positive direction set, and initialize empty registered operation relations plus an initialized_active stage receipt. With an empty traversal set activity=inactive and inactive_reason=empty_traversal, emit empty candidates, visits, and registered relations plus an initialized_inactive stage receipt; never infer candidate content from positioned profiles alone.

Transform exactly one complete current_candidate_relation_state without changing registered operation relations. If inactive, preserve it and append a skipped_inactive target stage receipt. If active with scope mismatch, preserve it and append a skipped_scope_mismatch receipt. If active with matching scope, retain each direction whose target support rank is at least one and append an applied target stage receipt. Never change visits or invent candidates.

Consume exactly the final complete candidate_relation_state. For inactive state emit empty candidate directions, binding_relation none, and empty registered operation relations regardless of invoked skipped stages. For active state canonicalize directions as the unique negative-before-positive set, preserve applied registered operation relations, and emit none, single_direction, or contested relation from cardinality. No endorsement or adjudication.

Close one Ghost semantic decision from exact access booleans, original accessible_positions_ordered, traversal result, detached candidate projection, separate fixed adjudication projection, and ordered candidate-state stage receipts. Copy original accessible positions to accessed_material_positions_ordered and traversal output to visited_material_positions_ordered. Derive target_guidance_used true only from an applied apply_target_candidate_eligibility receipt and ghost_program_used true only from at least one applied declared-program operator receipt; invocation, skipped_inactive, initialized, or skipped_scope_mismatch receipts never set either flag. Preserve the fixed seed-traverse-bind phase order, invent no candidate content for inactive state, and attach no opaque lineage.

deterministic_preprocessor_declarations.opcode_semantics: Preserve declared record order and emit unique position-keyed rows containing source_position and exact five-part canonical scope-match only; reject incomplete or duplicate zero-based positions and never expose material content.
Preserve declared record order and emit unique position-keyed rows containing source_position and effective_before_k, where true means strict effective ordinal less than access ordinal k.
Preserve declared record order and emit unique position/profile rows only for narrative_terrain_fixture; never expose another source kind or coerce tagged missing.
Preserve declared record order and emit unique position/status/profile rows only for episode_integration_receipt_fixture; never expose another source kind or promote status.
Preserve declared record order and emit unique position/kind/status rows only for contested_binding_receipt_fixture; direction_profile is not a source path and cannot be inspected.
Preserve declared record order and emit unique position/profile rows only for implicit_plastic_trace_fixture; never expose another source kind or coerce tagged missing.
Preserve declared order and emit exactly positions whose source kind is implicit_plastic_trace_fixture.
Preserve declared record order and emit position-keyed source_position/status rows only for pre_access_accessibility_snapshot records so effective eligibility can be joined by position.

Copy every source_position exactly once in raw source-record declaration order. This order-only structural projection exposes no kind, profile, status, scope, identity, or eligibility and never sorts numerically.
Emit exact five-part canonical scope equality for the reception intervention; never inspect profile content.
Emit exact five-part canonical scope equality for the target-form intervention; never inspect profile content.
Project accessible material positions in declared order, requiring a unique complete zero-based set when material is present.
Normalize each edge to lower-position then higher-position while preserving declared edge order; reject loops, duplicates, and endpoints outside accessible positions.
Preserve accessible-material declaration order and emit unique position-keyed position/direction-profile rows; reject duplicate positions and never coerce missing values.
Emit exact five-part canonical scope equality for target guidance; preserve claimed or unknown target resolution and never upgrade it.

adjudicator_contract.opcode_semantics: Read only the immutable candidate projection: empty maps to deferred, negative-only to adopted_negative, positive-only to adopted_positive, and both directions to contested; emit a separate append-only detached adjudication projection with no Episode integration or external-truth authority.
